Package org.mitre.synthea.modules

Class LifecycleModule

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.engine.Module
org.mitre.synthea.modules.LifecycleModule
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable
public final class LifecycleModule extends Module
LifecycleModule is responsible for managing the lifecycle of a Person.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Death From Lack of Treatment SNOMED Code (Due to a Payer not covering treatment) Note: This SNOMED Code (397709008) is just for death - not death from lack of treatment.

    Attribute key for the age at which a person quit alcoholism

    Attribute key for the probability a person stops drinking per process call

    QUIT_SMOKING_AGE
    Attribute key for the age at which the person stopped smoking
    static final String
    QUIT_SMOKING_PROBABILITY
    Attribute key for the probability a person quits smoking per process call

    Adjust the probability of a patients adherence to Doctor orders, whether medication, careplans, whatever.

    Mark a person as dead if they are old enough or if they roll a random number that is less than the likelihood of death for their age.

    Determines whether a person dies due to loss-of-care and lack of necessary treatment.

    • LOSS_OF_CARE

      public static final HealthRecord.Code LOSS_OF_CARE
      Death From Lack of Treatment SNOMED Code (Due to a Payer not covering treatment) Note: This SNOMED Code (397709008) is just for death - not death from lack of treatment.

  • Method Details

    • clone

      public Module clone()
      Description copied from class: Module
      Clone this module. Never provide the original.
      Overrides:
      clone in class Module

    • process

      public boolean process(Person person, long time)
      Description copied from class: Module
      Process this Module with the given Person at the specified time within the simulation. Processing will complete if the person dies.
      Overrides:
      process in class Module
      Parameters:
      person - : the person being simulated
      time - : the date within the simulated world
      Returns:
      completed : whether or not this Module completed.

    • birth

      public static void birth(Person person, long time)
      For unto us a child is born.
      Parameters:
      person - The baby.
      time - The time of birth.

    • lookupGrowthChart

      public static double lookupGrowthChart(String chartType, String gender, int ageInMonths, double percentile)
      Lookup and calculate values from the CDC growth charts, using the LMS values to calculate the intermediate values. Reference : https://www.cdc.gov/growthcharts/percentile_data_files.htm

      Note: BMI values only available for ageInMonths 24 - 240 as BMI is not typically useful in patients under 24 months.

      Parameters:
      chartType - "height" | "weight" | "bmi" | "head"
      gender - "M" | "F"
      ageInMonths - 0 - 240
      percentile - 0.0 - 1.0
      Returns:
      The height (cm), weight (kg), bmi (%), or head (cm)

    • percentileForBMI

      public static double percentileForBMI(double bmi, String gender, int ageInMonths)
      Look up the percentile that a given BMI falls into based on gender and age in months.
      Parameters:
      bmi - the BMI to find the percentile for
      gender - "M" | "F"
      ageInMonths - 24 - 240
      Returns:
      0 - 1.0

    • setCurrentWeightForLengthPercentile

      public static void setCurrentWeightForLengthPercentile(Person person, long time)
      If the person is 36 months old or less, then the "weight for length" percentile attribute is set. Otherwise, it is removed.
      Parameters:
      person - The person.
      time - The time during the simulation.

    • death

      protected static void death(Person person, long time)
      Mark a person as dead if they are old enough or if they roll a random number that is less than the likelihood of death for their age.
      Parameters:
      person - the person to check for death.
      time - the time of the simulation

    • likelihoodOfDeath

      protected static double likelihoodOfDeath(int age)
      Function that determines the probability of death based on age.
      Parameters:
      age - the age of the person in years.
      Returns:
      the probability of death in the next year.

    • deathFromLossOfCare

      public static boolean deathFromLossOfCare(Person person)
      Determines whether a person dies due to loss-of-care and lack of necessary treatment.
      Parameters:
      person - the person to check for loss of care death.
      Returns:
      true if the person dies from loss of care, false otherwise.

    • quitSmoking

      public static void quitSmoking(Person person, long time)
      If the person is a smoker, there is a small chance they will quit.
      Parameters:
      person - The person who might quit smoking.
      time - The current time in the simulation.

    • quitAlcoholism

      public static void quitAlcoholism(Person person, long time)
      If the person is an alcoholic, there is a small chance they will quit.
      Parameters:
      person - The person who might quit drinking.
      time - The current time in the simulation.

    • adherence

      public static void adherence(Person person, long time)
      Adjust the probability of a patients adherence to Doctor orders, whether medication, careplans, whatever.
      Parameters:
      person - The patient to consider.
      time - The time in the simulation.

    • isDisabled

      public static boolean isDisabled(Person person, long time)
      Determines if the person is disabled according to input file criteria. If the input file is unavailable, the default is false.
      Parameters:
      person - The person.
      time - The time.
      Returns:
      true or false.

    • getEarliestDisabilityDiagnosisTime

      public static long getEarliestDisabilityDiagnosisTime(Person person)
      Determines earliest disability diagnosis time according to input file criteria. If the input file is unavailable, the default is Long.MAX_VALUE.
      Parameters:
      person - The person.
      Returns:
      Time of earliest disability diagnosis.

    • getAllCodes

      public static Collection<HealthRecord.Code> getAllCodes()
      Get all of the Codes this module uses, for inventory purposes.
      Returns:
      Collection of all codes and concepts this module uses

    • inventoryAttributes

      public static void inventoryAttributes(Map<String,Attributes.Inventory> attributes)
      Populate the given attribute map with the list of attributes that this module reads/writes with example values when appropriate.
      Parameters:
      attributes - Attribute map to populate.
